resolve requested mode
override -> discovery/http -> static/http -> requires_js/playwright -> base mode

inner fetcher builds pageData
robots + pacing + throttling + navigation + capture

classify failure
host budget/backoff
frontier record
repair handoff
trace write

scheduler may retry or switch modes
otherwise continue queue
